attributes.action: Create a more diverse national curriculum.
attributes.additional_details: The current national curriculums core subject is too narrow, focusing only on academic subjects like English and maths instead of developing core skills. Adding a humanity and art creates a more well rounded student and allows them to learn about the world around them. Exam based courses only caters for students who can perform well under pressure. Having controlled assessments and coursework allows students who don't succeed in exams to show their knowledge and skills.
attributes.background: We want to transition the current core subjects to add more creative and humanities based subjects. Additionally less focus on exams and reintroducing controlled assessments and coursework.

rejection.details:
There are already open petitions covering these requests, such as:

Stop GCSE exams 
https://petition.parliament.uk/petitions/744304

Abolish all written/timed exams in every GCSE/A-Level & make them practical 
https://petition.parliament.uk/petitions/751308

Review the amount of written exams for GCSEs 
https://petition.parliament.uk/petitions/752161

Protect & reinstate funding for arts & humanities in higher & further education 
https://petition.parliament.uk/petitions/746787
